columns.subscription_id: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY — Unique subscription ID
columns.listed_price: REAL — List price per seat in $ (before promotions; enterprise may have negotiated price)
columns.promotion: REAL — Total promotion $ currently applied (updated at each billing cycle)
columns.effective_price: REAL — Actual price per seat = listed_price - promotion (floored at 0). Use this for revenue/satisfaction calculations.
columns.end_day: INTEGER — Day subscription ended (NULL if active)
columns.seat_count: INTEGER — Number of seats for this subscription
columns.pending_plan: TEXT — Scheduled plan change (NULL if none)
columns.pending_price: REAL — Negotiated price for pending plan change
columns.contract_end_day: INTEGER — Day when contract expires (NULL for month-to-month)
